    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="ko">
    <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Solo CRM</title>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Pretendard:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/xlsx/0.18.5/xlsx.full.min.js"></script>
    <style>
    :root {
    /* ④ Warm Paper Light — bright, violet accent */
    --bg: #f5f4f0;
    --bg2: #eeecea;
    --surface: #ffffff;
    --surface2: #f5f4f0;
    --surface3: #eae8e3;
    --border: #dedad2;
    --border2: #c8c4ba;
    --text: #1c1a16;
    --text2: #5a5850;
    --text3: #9a9890;
    /* Violet accent */
    --ac: #4f46e5;
    --ac2: #6366f1;
    --ac-dim: rgba(79,70,229,.10);
    --ac-glow: rgba(79,70,229,.22);
    /* Status colors */
    --green: #16a34a; --green-d: rgba(22,163,74,.10);
    --yellow: #d97706; --yellow-d:rgba(217,119,6,.10);
    --orange: #ea580c; --orange-d:rgba(234,88,12,.10);
    --red: #dc2626; --red-d: rgba(220,38,38,.10);
    --blue: #2563eb; --blue-d: rgba(37,99,235,.10);
    --purple: #9333ea; --purple-d:rgba(147,51,234,.10);
    --teal: #0d9488; --teal-d: rgba(13,148,136,.10);
    --r: 10px; --rs: 6px;
    --shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.10);
    --shadow-lg: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.14);
    }
    *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
    body{font-family:'Pretendard',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);min-height:100vh;font-size:14px;line-height:1.6}
    ::-webkit-scrollbar{width:10px;height:10px}
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:transparent}
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border2);border-radius:5px}
    /* ── App Shell ── */
    .app{display:flex;height:100vh;overflow:hidden}
    /* ── Sidebar ── */
    .sidebar{
    width:230px;min-width:230px;
    background:var(--surface);
    border-right:1px solid var(--border);
    display:flex;flex-direction:column;
    overflow:hidden;
    }
    .logo{
    padding:18px 16px 14px;
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .logo-mark{
    font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
    font-size:14px;font-weight:500;
    color:var(--ac2);letter-spacing:.04em;
    }
    .logo-sub{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:1px;letter-spacing:.08em}
    .nav{padding:10px 0;flex:1;overflow-y:auto}
    .nav-section{
    font-size:9px;font-weight:600;
    text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.12em;
    color:var(--text3);
    padding:12px 16px 4px;
    }
    .nav-item{
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;
    padding:8px 16px;
    cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;color:var(--text2);
    border-left:2px solid transparent;
    transition:all .15s;
    }
    .nav-item:hover{color:var(--text);background:var(--surface2)}
    .nav-item.active{color:var(--ac2);background:var(--ac-dim);border-left-color:var(--ac)}
    .nav-icon{font-size:14px;width:16px;text-align:center}
    .nav-badge{
    margin-left:auto;
    background:var(--ac);color:#fff;
    font-size:9px;font-weight:700;
    padding:1px 5px;border-radius:20px;
    min-width:16px;text-align:center;
    }
    /* ── Todo widget in sidebar ── */
    .todo-widget{
    border-top:1px solid var(--border);
    padding:12px 14px;
    background:var(--bg2);
    }
    .todo-header{
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
    margin-bottom:8px;
    }
    .todo-title{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--text3)}
    .todo-input-row{display:flex;gap:5px;margin-bottom:8px;overflow:hidden}
    .todo-input-row input{
    flex:1;min-width:0;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:var(--rs);padding:5px 8px;
    color:var(--text);font-family:inherit;font-size:12px;outline:none;
    }
    .todo-input-row input:focus{border-color:var(--ac)}
    .todo-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;max-height:160px;overflow-y:auto}
    .todo-item{
    display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:7px;
    font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);
    padding:3px 0;
    cursor:pointer;
    }
    .todo-check{
    width:14px;height:14px;min-width:14px;
    border:1px solid var(--border2);
    border-radius:3px;margin-top:2px;
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    font-size:9px;transition:all .15s;
    }
    .todo-item.done .todo-check{background:var(--green);border-color:var(--green);color:#fff}
    .todo-item.done .todo-text{text-decoration:line-through;color:var(--text3)}
    .todo-item:hover .todo-del{opacity:1}
    .todo-del{opacity:0;margin-left:auto;color:var(--text3);font-size:11px;transition:opacity .15s}
    .sidebar-bottom{
    border-top:1px solid var(--border);
    padding:10px 14px;
    display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;
    }
    /* ── Main ── */
    .main{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden}
    .topbar{
    height:54px;min-height:54px;
    background:var(--surface);
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
    display:flex;align-items:center;
    padding:0 22px;gap:14px;
    }
    .topbar-title{font-size:15px;font-weight:600;flex:1}
    .search-wrap{
    display:flex;align-items:center;
    background:var(--surface2);
    border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:var(--rs);
    padding:6px 11px;gap:7px;width:260px;
    transition:border-color .15s;
    }
    .search-wrap:focus-within{border-color:var(--ac)}
    .search-wrap input{
    background:none;border:none;outline:none;
    color:var(--text);font-family:inherit;font-size:13px;width:100%;
    }
    .search-wrap input::placeholder{color:var(--text3)}
    .content{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:22px}
    /* ── Buttons ── */
    .btn{
    display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;
    padding:7px 14px;border-radius:var(--rs);
    border:none;cursor:pointer;
    font-family:inherit;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;
    transition:all .15s;
    }
    .btn-primary{background:var(--ac);color:#fff}
    .btn-primary:hover{background:var(--ac2);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--ac-glow)}
    .btn-ghost{background:transparent;color:var(--text2);border:1px solid var(--border)}
    .btn-ghost:hover{background:var(--surface2);color:var(--text);border-color:var(--border2)}
    .btn-danger{background:var(--red-d);color:var(--red);border:1px solid transparent}
    .btn-danger:hover{background:rgba(248,113,113,.2)}
    .btn-sm{padding:4px 10px;font-size:12px}
    .btn-xs{padding:2px 7px;font-size:11px}
    .btn-icon{padding:5px 8px}
    /* ── Cards ── */
    .card{
    background:var(--surface);
    border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:var(--r);
    padding:20px;
    }
    .card+.card,.card+.mb4{margin-top:16px}
    /* ── Stats ── */
    .stats-bar{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px;margin-bottom:22px}
    .stat{
    background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:var(--r);padding:14px 16px;
    }
    .stat-label{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;margin-bottom:3px}
    .stat-val{font-size:22px;font-weight:700;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace}
    .stat-sub{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:1px}
    /* ── Company Grid ── */
    .co-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(310px,1fr));gap:14px}
    .co-card{
    background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:var(--r);padding:16px;
    cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
    }
    .co-card::before{
    content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;
    background:var(--ac);opacity:0;transition:opacity .2s;
    }
    .co-card:hover{border-color:var(--border2);transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
    .co-card:hover::before{opacity:1}
    .co-head{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:10px}
    .co-name{font-size:15px;font-weight:600}
    .co-industry{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px}
    .co-meta{font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px}
    .co-meta-row{display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center}
    .ml{color:var(--text3);min-width:52px;font-size:11px}
    .co-next{
    margin-top:10px;padding:7px 10px;
    background:var(--ac-dim);border-radius:var(--rs);
    font-size:11px;color:var(--ac2);
    border-left:2px solid var(--ac);
    }
    /* ── Status / Stage badges ── */
    .badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:20px;font-size:11px;font-weight:500;white-space:nowrap}
    .s-잠재고객{background:var(--blue-d);color:var(--blue)}
    .s-가망고객{background:var(--teal-d);color:var(--teal)}
    .s-상담고객{background:var(--yellow-d);color:var(--yellow)}
    .s-제안고객{background:var(--orange-d);color:var(--orange)}
    .s-계약고객{background:var(--green-d);color:var(--green)}
    .s-냉담고객{background:var(--surface3);color:var(--text3)}
    .s-관리고객{background:var(--purple-d);color:var(--purple)}
    /* ── Detail Layout ── */
    .detail-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 340px;gap:22px}
    .sec-title{
    font-size:10px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;
    letter-spacing:.12em;color:var(--text3);
    margin-bottom:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
    }
    .sec-title::after{content:'';flex:1;height:1px;background:var(--border)}
    /* ── Form fields ── */
    .field{margin-bottom:12px}
    .field label{
    display:block;font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);
    margin-bottom:5px;font-weight:500;
    text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;
    }
    .field input,.field select,.field textarea{
    width:100%;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:var(--rs);padding:7px 11px;
    color:var(--text);font-family:inherit;font-size:13px;
    outline:none;transition:border-color .15s;
    }
    .field input:focus,.field select:focus,.field textarea:focus{border-color:var(--ac)}
    .field textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:75px}
    .field select option{background:var(--surface2)}
    .frow{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px}
    .frow3{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:10px}
    /* ── Info grid in detail ── */
    .info-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;margin-bottom:16px}
    .info-item label{display:block;font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:3px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;font-weight:500}
    .info-item .val{font-size:13px;color:var(--text)}
    .info-item .val.empty{color:var(--text3);font-style:italic}
    /* ── People list ── */
    .people-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}
    .person-row{
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
    padding:9px 12px;
    background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:var(--rs);
    }
    .person-avatar{
    width:32px;height:32px;min-width:32px;
    border-radius:50%;
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    font-size:13px;font-weight:600;
    background:var(--ac-dim);color:var(--ac2);
    }
    .person-info{flex:1}
    .person-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:500}
    .person-role{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3)}
    .person-contact{font-size:11px;color:var(--text2)}
    .person-type-chip{
    font-size:10px;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:20px;
    border:1px solid var(--border2);color:var(--text3);
    }
    /* ── Timeline ── */
    .timeline{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0}
    .tl-item{display:flex;gap:14px;padding-bottom:18px;position:relative}
    .tl-item:not(:last-child)::after{
    content:'';position:absolute;left:17px;top:36px;bottom:0;
    width:1px;background:var(--border);
    }
    .tl-dot{
    width:34px;height:34px;min-width:34px;
    border-radius:50%;background:var(--surface2);
    border:1px solid var(--border);
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    font-size:13px;z-index:1;
    }
    .tl-body{flex:1}
    .tl-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;margin-bottom:5px;flex-wrap:wrap}
    .tl-date{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace}
    .tl-method{font-size:10px;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:20px;background:var(--surface3);color:var(--text2)}
    .tl-box{
    background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:var(--r);padding:12px;
    }
    .tl-summary{font-size:13px;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:6px}
    .tl-decision{font-size:11px;color:var(--yellow);padding:3px 8px;background:var(--yellow-d);border-radius:var(--rs);display:inline-block;margin-bottom:5px}
    .tl-next{font-size:11px;color:var(--ac2);padding:3px 8px;background:var(--ac-dim);border-radius:var(--rs);display:inline-block}
    .tl-attachments{margin-top:7px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:5px}
    .att-chip{
    display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;
    padding:2px 8px;border-radius:20px;font-size:10px;
    background:var(--surface3);border:1px solid var(--border);
    color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;
    transition:all .15s;
    }
    .att-chip:hover{border-color:var(--ac);color:var(--ac2)}
    /* ── Recent / Actions list ── */
    .rec-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px}
    .rec-item{
    background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:var(--r);padding:13px 15px;
    cursor:pointer;transition:border-color .15s;
    display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;
    }
    .rec-item:hover{border-color:var(--border2)}
    .rec-date{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;min-width:72px;padding-top:1px}
    .rec-body{flex:1}
    .rec-co{font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:var(--ac2);margin-bottom:2px}
    .rec-summary{font-size:12px;color:var(--text2)}
    /* ── Calendar view ── */
    .cal-wrap{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 300px;gap:20px}
    .cal-grid{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r);overflow:hidden}
    .cal-header{
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
    padding:14px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
    background:var(--surface2);
    }
    .cal-nav{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
    .cal-month{font-size:15px;font-weight:600}
    .cal-days-header{
    display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .cal-day-name{
    text-align:center;padding:8px 4px;
    font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);font-weight:500;
    }
    .cal-body{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr)}
    .cal-cell{
    min-height:80px;border-right:1px solid var(--border);
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
    padding:6px;
    transition:background .15s;cursor:pointer;
    }
    .cal-cell:nth-child(7n){border-right:none}
    .cal-cell:hover{background:var(--surface2)}
    .cal-cell.today .cal-num{
    background:var(--ac);color:#fff;
    border-radius:50%;width:22px;height:22px;
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    }
    .cal-cell.other-month .cal-num{color:var(--text3)}
    .cal-num{font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:4px;width:22px;text-align:center}
    .cal-event{
    font-size:10px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;
    background:var(--ac-dim);color:var(--ac2);
    white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;
    margin-bottom:2px;
    }
    .cal-event.contact{background:var(--green-d);color:var(--green)}
    .cal-event.todo{background:var(--yellow-d);color:var(--yellow)}
    .cal-sidebar{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px}
    .cal-event-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:7px;max-height:400px;overflow-y:auto}
    .cal-ev-item{
    padding:9px 12px;
    background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:var(--rs);font-size:12px;
    }
    .cal-ev-date{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;margin-bottom:2px}
    .cal-ev-title{color:var(--text);font-weight:500}
    .cal-ev-company{color:var(--ac2);font-size:11px}
    /* ── Email draft ── */
    .email-wrap{display:grid;grid-template-columns:280px 1fr;gap:20px}
    .email-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:7px}
    .email-item{
    padding:10px 12px;background:var(--surface);
    border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rs);
    cursor:pointer;transition:border-color .15s;
    }
    .email-item:hover,.email-item.active{border-color:var(--ac);background:var(--ac-dim)}
    .email-item-company{font-size:12px;font-weight:500;color:var(--ac2)}
    .email-item-subject{font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:2px}
    .email-item-date{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:3px;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace}
    .email-compose{
    background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:var(--r);padding:20px;
    }
    .email-field{margin-bottom:10px}
    .email-field label{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;display:block;margin-bottom:4px}
    .email-field input,.email-field textarea{
    width:100%;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:var(--rs);padding:7px 10px;
    color:var(--text);font-family:inherit;font-size:13px;outline:none;
    }
    .email-field textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:200px}
    .email-field input:focus,.email-field textarea:focus{border-color:var(--ac)}
    /* ── Modal ── */
    .overlay{
    position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.72);
    backdrop-filter:blur(5px);z-index:100;
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:16px;
    opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .2s;
    }
    .overlay.open{opacity:1;pointer-events:all}
    .modal{
    background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border2);
    border-radius:14px;width:100%;max-width:600px;
    max-height:88vh;overflow-y:auto;
    box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);
    transform:translateY(8px);transition:transform .2s;
    }
    .overlay.open .modal{transform:translateY(0)}
    .modal-lg{max-width:740px}
    .mhead{
    padding:18px 22px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
    position:sticky;top:0;background:var(--surface);z-index:1;
    }
    .mtitle{font-size:15px;font-weight:600}
    .mbody{padding:22px}
    .mfoot{
    padding:14px 22px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);
    display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;gap:9px;
    position:sticky;bottom:0;background:var(--surface);
    }
    /* ── Excel import ── */
    .drop-zone{
    border:2px dashed var(--border2);border-radius:var(--r);
    padding:30px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;
    transition:all .15s;font-size:13px;color:var(--text3);
    }
    .drop-zone:hover,.drop-zone.drag-over{border-color:var(--ac);color:var(--ac2);background:var(--ac-dim)}
    .preview-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:12px;margin-top:12px}
    .preview-table th,.preview-table td{
    padding:6px 10px;text-align:left;
    border:1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .preview-table th{background:var(--surface2);color:var(--text2);font-weight:500}
    .preview-table td{color:var(--text)}
    .map-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:7px;font-size:12px}
    .map-row label{min-width:100px;color:var(--text2)}
    .map-row select{
    flex:1;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:var(--rs);padding:5px 8px;
    color:var(--text);font-family:inherit;font-size:12px;outline:none;
    }
    /* ── Toast ── */
    .toast{
    position:fixed;bottom:22px;right:22px;
    background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border2);
    border-radius:var(--r);padding:11px 16px;
    font-size:13px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);
    z-index:200;transform:translateY(8px);opacity:0;
    transition:all .2s;pointer-events:none;
    }
    .toast.show{transform:translateY(0);opacity:1}
    /* ── Utils ── */
    .page{display:none}.page.active{display:block}
    .back-btn{
    display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;
    color:var(--text3);font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;
    padding:3px 0;margin-bottom:18px;
    transition:color .15s;
    }
    .back-btn:hover{color:var(--text)}
    .mb4{margin-bottom:16px}
    mark{background:var(--ac-dim);color:var(--ac2);border-radius:2px}
    .tag{
    display:inline-flex;align-items:center;
    padding:1px 7px;border-radius:4px;font-size:10px;
    background:var(--surface3);color:var(--text2);border:1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .empty-state{text-align:center;padding:50px 20px;color:var(--text3)}
    .empty-state .ei{font-size:36px;margin-bottom:10px}
    .empty-state p{font-size:13px}
    .divider{height:1px;background:var(--border);margin:16px 0}
    .mono{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace}
    /* ── List view table */
    .co-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:12px}
    .co-table th{
    background:var(--surface2);color:var(--text3);
    font-size:10px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;
    padding:8px 10px;text-align:left;border-bottom:2px solid var(--border);
    white-space:nowrap;
    }
    .co-table td{
    padding:9px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
    color:var(--text);vertical-align:top;
    }
    .co-table tr:hover td{background:var(--surface2)}
    .co-table td.name{font-weight:600;color:var(--ac2)}
    .co-table td.muted{color:var(--text2);font-size:11px}
    .co-table td.memo{max-width:160px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;color:var(--text3);font-size:11px}
    /* ── View toggle */
    .view-btn{
    padding:4px 12px;border-radius:7px;font-size:12px;font-weight:500;
    border:none;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;
    background:transparent;color:var(--text3);
    }
    .view-btn.on{background:var(--ac);color:#fff}
    /* ── Print styles */
    @media print{
    /* 인쇄 시 숨길 요소 */
    .sidebar,.topbar,.filterBar,#filterBar,
    .stats-bar,#statsBar,.view-toggle-row,
    button,.btn,.nav-badge,
    #page-recent,#page-actions,#page-calendar,
    #page-detail,#page-email{display:none!important}
    /* 레이아웃 */
    .app{display:block!important}
    .main{overflow:visible!important;width:100%!important}
    .content{overflow:visible!important;padding:8px!important}
    /* companies 페이지만 표시 */
    #page-companies{display:block!important}
    .co-grid{display:none!important}
    #companyTable{display:block!important}
    /* 인쇄 헤더 */
    .print-header{display:block!important}
    .no-print{display:none!important}
    /* 테이블 스타일 */
    body{background:#fff!important;color:#000!important;font-size:10px}
    .co-table{width:100%!important}
    .co-table th{background:#e8e8e8!important;color:#000!important;
    border:1px solid #999!important;padding:5px 7px!important;font-size:10px!important}
    .co-table td{color:#000!important;border:1px solid #ccc!important;
    padding:4px 7px!important;font-size:10px!important}
    .co-table td.name{color:#00008b!important;font-weight:bold!important}
    .badge{background:#eee!important;color:#333!important;
    border:1px solid #999!important;font-size:9px!important}
    @page{margin:12mm 10mm;size:A4 landscape}
    }
    .print-header{
    display:none;
    margin-bottom:12px;
    padding-bottom:8px;
    border-bottom:2px solid #333;
    }
    .print-header h2{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px}
    .print-header p{font-size:11px;color:#666}
    </style>
    // ════════════════════════════════════════
    // SUPABASE 연동
    // ════════════════════════════════════════
    const SUPA_URL = 'https://fpumejzdwpoyclbcuhmj.supabase.co';
    const SUPA_KEY = 'sb_publishable_ARrEFzxIfbu_sMHRHaWmfg_FbHMIibn';
    async function supaGet(){
    try{
    const r = await fetch(SUPA_URL+'/rest/v1/crm_data?id=eq.main', {
    headers:{'apikey':SUPA_KEY,'Authorization':'Bearer '+SUPA_KEY}
    });
    const d = await r.json();
    return d && d[0] ? d[0] : null;
    }catch(e){ console.error('supaGet error',e); return null; }
    }
    async function supaSet(data){
    try{
    await fetch(SUPA_URL+'/rest/v1/crm_data?id=eq.main', {
    method:'PATCH',
    headers:{
    'apikey':SUPA_KEY,'Authorization':'Bearer '+SUPA_KEY,
    'Content-Type':'application/json','Prefer':'return=minimal'
    },
    body:JSON.stringify({
    companies:data.companies,
    contacts:data.contacts,
    todos:data.todos,
    emails:data.emails,
    appointments:data.appointments,
    updated_at:new Date().toISOString()
    })
    });
    }catch(e){ console.error('supaSet error',e); }
    }
    // 자동 저장 (3초 디바운스)
    let _saveTimer=null;
    function scheduleSave(){
    clearTimeout(_saveTimer);
    _saveTimer=setTimeout(function(){
    supaSet({
    companies:DB.companies,
    contacts:DB.contacts,
    todos:DB.todos,
    emails:DB.emails,
    appointments:DB.appointments
    });
    },3000);
    }
    // 동기화 상태 표시
    function showSyncStatus(msg, isError){
    var el=document.getElementById('syncStatus');
    if(!el) return;
    el.textContent=msg;
    el.style.color=isError?'var(--red)':'var(--green)';
    setTimeout(function(){ el.textContent=''; },3000);
    }
    </head>
    <body>
    <div class="app">
    <!-- ── SIDEBAR ── -->
    <aside class="sidebar">
    <div class="logo">
    <div class="logo-mark">Solo CRM</div>
    <div class="logo-sub">1인 컨설턴트용</div>
    </div>
    <nav class="nav">
    <div class="nav-section">메인</div>
    <div class="nav-item active" id="nav-companies" onclick="showPage('companies')">
    <span class="nav-icon">🏢</span> 고객사 정보
    </div>
    <div class="nav-item" id="nav-recent" onclick="showPage('recent')">
    <span class="nav-icon">📋</span> 접촉일지
    <span class="nav-badge" id="badge-recent">0</span>
    </div>
    <div class="nav-item" id="nav-actions" onclick="showPage('actions')">
    <span class="nav-icon">✅</span> 다음 액션
    <span class="nav-badge" id="badge-actions">0</span>
    </div>
    <div class="nav-section">도구</div>
    <div class="nav-item" id="nav-calendar" onclick="showPage('calendar')">
    <span class="nav-icon">📅</span> 캘린더
    </div>
    </nav>
    <!-- Today's Todo -->
    <div class="todo-widget">
    <div class="todo-header">
    <div class="todo-title">오늘의 할 일</div>
    <span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3)" id="todo-progress"></span>
    </div>
    <div class="todo-input-row">
    <input type="text" id="todoInput" placeholder="할 일 추가..." onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')addTodo()">
    <button class="btn btn-primary btn-icon" onclick="addTodo()" style="padding:5px 10px;font-size:14px;min-width:30px;flex-shrink:0">+</button>
    </div>
    <div class="todo-list" id="todoList"></div>
    </div>
    <div style="padding:8px 12px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between">
    <span id="syncStatus"></span>
    <button onclick="manualSync()" style="font-size:11px;padding:2px 8px;background:var(--ac-dim);color:var(--ac2);border:1px solid var(--ac);border-radius:var(--rs);cursor:pointer">☁ 동기화</button>
    </div>
    <div class="sidebar-bottom">
    <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onclick="exportData()">📤 내보내기</button>
    <label for="importJson" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" style="cursor:pointer;text-align:center">📥 JSON 가져오기</label>
    <input type="file" id="importJson" accept="*/*" style="position:absolute;width:0;height:0;opacity:0" onchange="importJSON(event)">
    <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onclick="openExcelImport()">📊 엑셀 가져오기</button>
    <div style="height:1px;background:var(--border);margin:4px 0"></div>
    <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="openResetModal()" style="background:var(--red-d);color:var(--red);border:1px solid transparent;width:100%;justify-content:center">🗑 전체 데이터 초기화</button>
    </div>
    </aside>
    <!-- ── MAIN ── -->
    <div class="main">
    <div class="topbar">
    <div class="topbar-title" id="topbar-title">고객사 정보</div>
    <div class="search-wrap">
    <span style="color:var(--text3)">🔍</span>
    <input type="text" id="searchInput" placeholder="회사, 담당자, 키워드..." oninput="handleSearch(this.value)">
    </div>
    <button class="btn btn-primary" id="topbar-btn" onclick="openCompanyModal()">+ 회사 추가</button>
    </div>
    <div class="content">
    <!-- ── Companies ── -->
    <div class="page active" id="page-companies">
    <!-- 보기 모드 토글 -->
    <div class="view-toggle-row" style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px">
    <div style="display:flex;gap:4px;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r);padding:3px">
    <button id="btn-active" onclick="setShowAll(false)"
    style="padding:4px 14px;border-radius:7px;font-size:12px;font-weight:500;border:none;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;
    background:var(--ac);color:#fff">
    ⚡ 활성 회사만
    </button>
    <button id="btn-all" onclick="setShowAll(true)"
    style="padding:4px 14px;border-radius:7px;font-size:12px;font-weight:500;border:none;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;
    background:transparent;color:var(--text3)">
    전체 보기
    </button>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px">
    <span id="activeCount" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3)"></span>
    <!-- 인쇄 -->
    <button onclick="printList()" style="padding:6px 14px;border-radius:var(--rs);background:var(--ac);color:#fff;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;font-size:13px;font-weight:500">🖨 인쇄</button>
    <button onclick="exportExcel()" style="padding:6px 14px;border-radius:var(--rs);background:var(--green);color:#fff;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;font-size:13px;font-weight:500">📊 엑셀 다운로드</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div id="filterBar" style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r);padding:12px 14px;margin-bottom:16px">
    <!-- 고객단계 -->
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:10px">
    <span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--text3);min-width:52px">고객단계</span>
    <div id="stageFilters" style="display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap"></div>
    </div>
    <!-- 지역 -->
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px">
    <span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--text3);min-width:52px;padding-top:3px">지역</span>
    <div style="flex:1">
    <div id="categoryButtons" style="display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:6px"></div>
    <div id="subCatButtons" style="display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;min-height:22px"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- 경로 -->
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:10px">
    <span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--text3);min-width:52px">경로</span>
    <div id="routeFilters" style="display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap"></div>
    </div>
    <!-- 명함등록일 + 초기화 -->
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap">
    <span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--text3);min-width:52px">명함등록</span>
    <input type="date" id="cardDateFrom" onchange="doFilter()"
    style="background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rs);padding:4px 8px;color:var(--text);font-family:inherit;font-size:12px;outline:none">
    <span style="color:var(--text3);font-size:11px">~</span>
    <input type="date" id="cardDateTo" onchange="doFilter()"
    style="background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rs);padding:4px 8px;color:var(--text);font-family:inherit;font-size:12px;outline:none">
    <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-xs" onclick="clearFilters()" style="margin-left:auto">필터 초기화</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="print-header" id="printHeader"></div>
    <div class="stats-bar" id="statsBar"></div>
    <div class="co-grid" id="companyGrid"></div>
    <div id="companyTable" style="display:none"></div>
    <div class="empty-state" id="coEmpty" style="display:none">
    <div class="ei">🏢</div>
    <p id="coEmptyMsg">활성 회사가 없습니다.</p>
    <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" style="margin-top:12px" onclick="setShowAll(true)">전체 보기</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- ── Recent / 접촉일지 ── -->
    <div class="page" id="page-recent">
    <div class="rec-list" id="recentList"></div>
    <div class="empty-state" id="recentEmpty" style="display:none">
    <div class="ei">📋</div><p>접촉 기록이 없습니다.</p>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- ── Actions ── -->
    <div class="page" id="page-actions">
    <div class="rec-list" id="actionsList"></div>
    <div class="empty-state" id="actionsEmpty" style="display:none">
    <div class="ei">✅</div><p>다음 액션이 없습니다.</p>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- ── Calendar ── -->
    <div class="page" id="page-calendar">
    <div class="cal-wrap">
    <div>
    <div class="cal-grid">
    <div class="cal-header">
    <div class="cal-nav">
    <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-icon btn-sm" onclick="calMove(-1)">‹</button>
    <span class="cal-month" id="calMonth"></span>
    <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-icon btn-sm" onclick="calMove(1)">›</button>
    </div>
    <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onclick="calToday()">오늘</button>
    </div>
    <div class="cal-days-header">
    <div class="cal-day-name" style="color:var(--red)">일</div>
    <div class="cal-day-name">월</div><div class="cal-day-name">화</div>
    <div class="cal-day-name">수</div><div class="cal-day-name">목</div>
    <div class="cal-day-name">금</div>
    <div class="cal-day-name" style="color:var(--blue)">토</div>
    </div>
    <div class="cal-body" id="calBody"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="cal-sidebar">
    <div class="card">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:12px">
    <div class="sec-title" style="margin-bottom:0">이달 일정</div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text3)">
    <span style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px"><span style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:2px;background:var(--green);display:inline-block"></span>접촉</span>
    <span style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px"><span style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:2px;background:var(--orange);display:inline-block"></span>다음스텝</span>
    <span style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px"><span style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:2px;background:var(--blue);display:inline-block"></span>약속</span>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="cal-event-list" id="calEventList"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- ── Detail ── -->
    <div class="page" id="page-detail">
    <div class="back-btn" onclick="showPage('companies')">← 목록으로</div>
    <div id="detailContent"></div>
    </div>
    </div><!-- /content -->
    </div><!-- /main -->
    </div><!-- /app -->
    <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
    MODALS
    ══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <!-- Company Modal -->
    <div class="overlay" id="companyModal">
    <div class="modal modal-lg">
    <div class="mhead">
    <div class="mtitle" id="coModalTitle">회사 추가</div>
    <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-icon btn-sm" onclick="closeModal('companyModal')">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="mbody">
    <div class="sec-title">기본 정보</div>
    <div class="frow" style="margin-bottom:12px">
    <div class="field"><label>회사명 *</label><input id="c-name" placeholder="(주)예시컨설팅"></div>
    <div class="field"><label>대분류(경로)</label>
    <select id="c-industry" onchange="updateSubCatOptions()">
    <option value="">선택</option>
    <option value="소개">소개</option>
    <option value="개척">개척</option>
    <option value="메가디비">메가디비</option>
    <option value="중기디비">중기디비</option>
    </select>
    </div>
    <div class="field"><label>중분류</label>
    <input id="c-subCategory" placeholder="중분류 입력" list="subCatList">
    <datalist id="subCatList"></datalist>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="frow" style="margin-bottom:12px">
    <div class="field"><label>대표</label><input id="c-contact-name" placeholder="홍길동"></div>
    <div class="field"><label>전화/연락처</label><input id="c-contact-info" placeholder="010-0000-0000"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="frow" style="margin-bottom:12px">
    <div class="field"><label>이메일</label><input id="c-email" type="email" placeholder="contact@company.com"></div>
    <div class="field"><label>고객 단계</label>
    <select id="c-status">
    <option value="잠재고객">잠재고객</option>
    <option value="가망고객">가망고객</option>
    <option value="상담고객">상담고객</option>
    <option value="제안고객">제안고객</option>
    <option value="계약고객">계약고객</option>
    <option value="냉담고객">냉담고객</option>
    <option value="관리고객">관리고객</option>
    </select>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom:12px">
    <label style="display:block;font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);font-weight:500;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;margin-bottom:6px">주소</label>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:120px 130px 1fr;gap:8px">
    <select id="c-sido" onchange="updateSiguOptions()"
    style="background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rs);padding:7px 10px;color:var(--text);font-family:inherit;font-size:13px;outline:none">
    <option value="">시/도 선택</option>
    <option>서울시</option><option>경기도</option><option>인천시</option>
    <option>광주시</option>
    <option>대전시</option><option>울산시</option><option>세종시</option>
    <option>강원도</option><option>충북</option><option>충남</option>
    <option>전북</option><option>전남</option><option>경북</option>
    <option>경남</option><option>제주도</option>
    </select>
    <input id="c-sigu" placeholder="시/구/군" list="siguList"
    style="background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rs);padding:7px 10px;color:var(--text);font-family:inherit;font-size:13px;outline:none">
    <datalist id="siguList"></datalist>
    <input id="c-address-detail" placeholder="상세주소 (동/로/번지)"
    style="background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rs);padding:7px 10px;color:var(--text);font-family:inherit;font-size:13px;outline:none">
    </div>
    <input type="hidden" id="c-address">
    </div>
    <div class="frow" style="margin-bottom:12px">
    <div class="field"><label>명함등록일</label><input id="c-card-date" type="date"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="field" style="margin-bottom:16px"><label>메모</label><textarea id="c-memo" placeholder="핵심 정보, 주의사항..."></textarea></div>
    <div class="divider"></div>
    <div class="sec-title">관련 인물</div>
    <div id="peopleEdit" style="margin-bottom:10px"></div>
    <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onclick="addPersonRow()">+ 관련 인물 추가</button>
    </div>
    <div class="mfoot">
    <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="closeModal('companyModal')">취소</button>
    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="saveCompany()">저장</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Contact Modal -->
    <div class="overlay" id="contactModal">
    <div class="modal">
    <div class="mhead">
    <div class="mtitle" id="contactModalTitle">접촉일지 추가</div>
    <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-icon btn-sm" onclick="closeModal('contactModal')">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="mbody">
    <div class="frow" style="margin-bottom:12px">
    <div class="field"><label>접촉 일시 *</label><input type="datetime-local" id="ct-datetime"></div>
    <div class="field"><label>접촉 방법</label>
    <select id="ct-method">
    <option value="전화">📞 전화</option>
    <option value="이메일">✉️ 이메일</option>
    <option value="미팅">🤝 미팅(대면)</option>
    <option value="화상">💻 화상 미팅</option>
    <option value="문자">💬 문자/메신저</option>
    <option value="방문">🚗 방문</option>
    <option value="기타">기타</option>
    </select>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom:12px">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:6px">
    <label style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);font-weight:500;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em">관련 담당자</label>
    <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-xs" onclick="addCtPersonRow()" type="button">+ 담당자 추가</button>
    </div>
    <div id="ctPersonList"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="field" style="margin-bottom:12px"><label>내용 요약 *</label><textarea id="ct-summary" placeholder="주요 논의 내용..."></textarea></div>
    <div class="field" style="margin-bottom:12px"><label>결정사항</label><input id="ct-decision" placeholder="합의된 내용..."></div>
    <div class="field" style="margin-bottom:16px"><label>다음 스텝</label><input id="ct-next" placeholder="다음에 할 일..."></div>
    <div style="margin-bottom:4px">
    <label style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;font-weight:500;display:block;margin-bottom:8px">자료 첨부</label>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:7px;margin-bottom:8px">
    <input type="text" id="ct-link-url" placeholder="URL 링크" style="flex:1;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rs);padding:6px 9px;color:var(--text);font-family:inherit;font-size:12px;outline:none">
    <input type="text" id="ct-link-name" placeholder="자료명" style="width:120px;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rs);padding:6px 9px;color:var(--text);font-family:inherit;font-size:12px;outline:none">
    <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onclick="addContactLink()">추가</button>
    </div>
    <div class="drop-zone" id="ctDrop" onclick="document.getElementById('ctFile').click()"
    ondragover="event.preventDefault();this.classList.add('drag-over')"
    ondragleave="this.classList.remove('drag-over')"
    ondrop="handleDrop(event)">
    📎 파일 드래그 또는 클릭 첨부 (최대 2MB)
    </div>
    <input type="file" id="ctFile" style="display:none" multiple onchange="handleFileInput(event)">
    <div id="ctAttachList" style="margin-top:7px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:5px"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="mfoot">
    <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="closeModal('contactModal')">취소</button>
    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="saveContact()">저장</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Appointment Modal -->
    <div class="overlay" id="apptModal">
    <div class="modal" style="max-width:460px">
    <div class="mhead">
    <div class="mtitle">📅 약속 추가</div>
    <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-icon btn-sm" onclick="closeModal('apptModal')">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="mbody">
    <div class="frow" style="margin-bottom:12px">
    <div class="field"><label>날짜 *</label><input type="date" id="appt-date"></div>
    <div class="field"><label>시간</label><input type="time" id="appt-time" value="10:00"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="field" style="margin-bottom:12px">
    <label>고객사 연결</label>
    <select id="appt-company">
    <option value="">-- 회사 선택 --</option>
    </select>
    </div>
    <div class="field" style="margin-bottom:12px">
    <label>내용 *</label>
    <input id="appt-title" placeholder="예: 제안서 PT 미팅">
    </div>
    <div class="field" style="margin-bottom:0">
    View remainder of file in raw view

    Footer

    © 2026 GitHub, Inc.

    • Privacy
    • Security
    • Status
